title: Automatic Time Tracking Stop

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am wanting to use Monday to track hours worked by my team.

I want my time tracking to begin on a new task when it is created with the ‘clock in’ column filled. I then want the time tracking to stop on this task when a new task is created with the ‘clock out’ column filled.

posts.author: MistyMK (AppBay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JaredJLY there is a new app called Smart Timer and Team Tracking, same look and feel as the native timer but more features. Pretty sure it does what you are wanting.

The timer will start/stop automatically on task change. And there is a reporting board where you can see all entries. Time entries are also sub tasks.

What might also be helpful when you have a team, is that you can see live what everyone is clocked on to.

Hope that helps!
